summary: Two-layer architecture reflects genuine mathematical structure: Bundle/FMCS CanonicalMCS provides sorry-free F/P via all-MCS domain but lacks TaskFrame structure, while Algebraic/ParametricCanonicalTaskFrame provides AddCommGroup+LinearOrder but has F/P sorries from chain construction. Unification blocked by fundamental tension: sorry-free F/P requires all-MCS domain (no group structure), TaskFrame requires Int/Rat (chain sorries). Recommended path: accept two layers, stabilize Succ-chain completeness (task 35), document architecture.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of two-layer architecture, sorries inventory, and implementation roadmap for unification
